description: TEMPLATE. Copy this file to data/golden_test_conversations.json and fill with your own regression tests. The real file is git-ignored because its reference answers embed personal data. Tests run via GoldenTestRunner in src/testing/conversation_tester.py. See AUDIT_REPORT.md P0-2.

tests.description: Bot must describe a member in third person, without claiming personal experience with them.
tests.question: Tell me about Alice
tests.reference: Alice is a group member who enjoys hiking on weekends.

tests.description: Bot should answer from retrieved group knowledge, not invent details.
tests.question: What does Bob do?
tests.reference: Bob works as a software engineer.
